titleStmt.title: SII 15.39: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 39. (B.K. No. 247 of 1927-28.) ŚIRŪR, BAGALKOT TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On two pieces of a slab in the maṇḍapa of the Rāmaliṅgasvāmi temple.

This is dated Śaka 1071, Vibhava, Pushya śu 9, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The date is not regular. The Śaka year cited was current and in the said cyclic year the Samkrānti occurred on Pushya śu 13, Saturday, corresponding to 1148 A.D., December 25.

It records a gift of land by Mahāprabhuviṇi Lakmādēvi. The earlier portion of the epigraph contains poetic description of several themes including this lady, her family and her husband Dēvarasa. In the course of this lengthy description are mentioned the twelve Gāvuṇḍas, Mārasiṅga, Rebbaladēvi's son Sōvaṇayya, and his wife Liṅgādēvī, Akkādēvī and her husband Chauḍeya-nāyaka, and Ādiyaṇṇa the Kulakaraṇi of Sirivura. As the epigraph is badly damaged many a link and detail in the description is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: 81 lines of this piece are damaged.

damagedThe left side of the stone
tōṟuguṁ śrīkaḷa
kuṁ taradiṁ
dādityālayanuṁ
gulava baḷasirppa naṁdanāvaḷigaḷina
hastaḷatevolu miḷirva patāke
�kara ballidarāhanada vijayalakṣmi
rvva�gā�ṁḍaru haṁnirvvaru bhānutēja
śrīpaṁjara nunāḷva
lakṣmīniḷaya vri
worn out
maga mārasiṁganiṁdaṁ
mārasiṁgaṁ rūpina kāma
budhakumuda vikasitasōva
hariyiṁ mallikārjjunaśiḷāstaṁbhaṁ taṭākatraya
geyoḷā mārasiṁga
paṁḍita bhū ballaha
ṭṭidaneṁba mahāprabhutvamaṁ nara vella baṇnisalu
hmacaryyaṁ tapamaṁ neṟekeydarilla jīyanutire kāṁcanate
ballahanu maṁḍaḷikarkkaḷā daṁḍanātharaṁ bhū taḷamuṁ mahā lakṣmīdēvi
. kaṁda . bhūvadhuviṁgeṇe rebbaladēviya maga sōvanayyanarasana sati liṁgādēvi
ṇāṁnviteyaṁbaḷu Atyaṁta ropu jagadalu satya saṁpūrṇna
jaḷamadhyada pyatyakṣa lakṣmī rakkādēvi . ballahanu ya
yakkādēvīvallabha yaṇa salla litaṁ
dalu puṭṭise yaṁdamṛtāṁbuviṁda dhikkari
vadhu cauḍayanāyaka
śrīvadhuviṁgeṇeyakkādēvige cauḍeyanāyakaṁgaṁ
ṭṭuvante lakṣaṇavaṁte . nuḍi dalu satyavallade nuḍiyaḷu naḍesalu dharmma
nuḍi satyaṁ naḍavudella manumunidharmma . dākṣiṇya
mahālakṣaṇe padmada naḍuvaṇa sākṣaraṁ� kṣmiyante lakmādēvi
kalpabhūja pasuvallada śrīsuradhēnu vibhu vaṁdige parijana lakmādēvi .
da surataru nāḍe ciṁtisidaḍī ciṁtāmaṇi tāṁ vaḍadaṁ ciṁtisadivaḷu siriya
lakmādēvi . parivārasurabhi vaṁdige surataru baṁdha[paṁḍi�rige] ciṁtāmaṇi maṁdaradaṁte peṁpu biṁpina dhareguṁ
sakaḷalakmādēvi . vritta . vikasitapaṁkajasai lōcana mattagavēṁdra�ne kētaki varagaṁdhi kōmaḷalatāṁgi
kaṁThe yācakajanakaḷpabhūja suradhēnu vibhu parivāra prakaṭita kīrtti
na . manasijarāja�rccisuva kabi na bilēna purvva kāmadēva�
gaḷā manōjananadaṭiṁ jaṁgamalatāṁga bulakṣmi lakṣmīdēvigeṇe mē
nakiyūrvvasi raṁbheyeṁbavaru . Atisaya rūpiniṁda tilōtteme hāvadaluṁ bhāvadaluṁ
madalōrvvasi sīteye rūḍhi peṁparuṁdhatiya viḷāsa
vicārisalu lakṣmiya lakṣaṇa lakṣmīdēvige . manasijarāja citralatayaṁba rūpi�lā dēviya
rāgadiṁ nayade kūrisidītane kāma nītane kusmāstre
no dēvarasanaṁte dēvarugaḷāro lōkadalu . poḍaviyamanu
daḍe dēvarasaṁ tāṁ kaḍeda śilālikhita tāṁbraśāsanadaṁdaṁ .
dalu bhāskarana sutanaṁ munpaḍeyoḷu harinaṁdananūnaneṁdoḍē varṇnipudō
naṁbinoḷu tuṁbisidoḷgaṁḍaṁ pu
ri peṁpinalu dharaṇi biṁpinalu jaḷarāsi guṁṣinalu dēvanaṁtirppa
piriyano rāya vibhu peṁpina biṁpina guṁpina
lu . vinayama dānaguṇa cāgadudāni
yuṁ vinaya dīva dānaguṇa
noḷu
naranallada nmanatanu
jinadēvara pādakamaḷabhriṁga bhāvana siṁga
rigati bhaktaneṁdu jagatītaḷa viśruta
nāvaṁ cauḍarasana siṁhā
dhara sārvvakālakhaṁḍite varadāna
haśraphaḷaṁ rasātaḷastutaphaṇirājanante sukavīṁdrajanapriyanalte . kaṁda . Alliya
kuḷakaraṇiyeṁbu baṇnisuguṁ sakaḷavidāgyama doreyaneṁbaṁ . ©
śrīrāmanaycevāḷada rāmarenisi gōtrabrātamaṁ sākṣarika dhāriṇige sa
meyi doḷage .
damaged
nādananāgaḷuṁ kīrttisuguṁ jagajjanaṁ . bhūtaḷavaṁdyanātana manōhari vallabha caṁḍiyakkanā sītege biṁpu
paṁpinaruṁdhati guṁpinalabdhiyaṁ jagakhyāteyanā patibrateyanā lalitā rājateyaṁ pādabhaktiya mahā
satiya pogaḷguṁ jagajjana . śrīge neleyenipa sirivura nāgaṁ kuḷakaraṇi yādiyaṇna
cāgadoḷinajātane ratnanaṁ budhajanāśraya mahājana prasaṁ
na gurujanabhaktanaṁ sakaḷalakṣaṇavaṁtanana paravadho�ranaṁ saka
ḷalakṣmīnivāsa rttikuṁ jana nipa sūryya niḷayaṁ surarājana
mānadante mēleseguṁ sirivura kīrttilakṣmī pūrṇna sasibiṁbada kāṁtiya nāḷigāṁ
volu purśanidhānaṁ vādiyaṇnanettida sūryya loppuva kāṁtiyante
. © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārāja rājaparamēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtterābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ
baraṁ saluttamire śrīmadrājadhāni kalyāṇada nalevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkethā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire sa
kavarśa 1071 neya vibhava saṁvatsarada puśyasuddha navami Ādityavāraduttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa vyatīpāta ma
hātithiyaṁdu śrīmanmahālakṣmi mahākāḷi pādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa śrīmanumahāpra
bhruviṇi lakmādēviyaru dīśānyadalu
haḷḷadiṁ baḍaga sēnabōvageyyiṁ mūḍa ya sthaḷa
dalu mūvatteraḍugēṇa kōlalu koṭṭa yī dharmmamaṁ spadharmma
diṁ pratipāḷisidaṁge kurukṣētraṁ kavile
ya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ hiraṇyadalaḷaṁkarisi sāsi brāhmaṇa
dānaṁ koṭṭa phalavakku Īdharmmamanaḷidaṁgā paṁcama
hāpātakavakku . ślōka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō suṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvva rśasa ṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ [.]
bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādhibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadāphalaṁ . Ī sāsanamaṁ
Ī sāsana
namaḥ .
Digital edition of SII 15.39 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
